contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 10
- Description: Actually I think you and me should probably have a strategic chat too when you are free later about the following:
  
  - how receptive the audience are to different SKU types in Brazil 
  
  - ⁠minting/printing of QR codes in FounderHaus 
  
  - ⁠thoughts on setting up a CNPJ and an associated PIX account which we can manage using API which gets triggered after onchain digital signature has been verified by the system. Now that the offline plumbing are in place, this is the digital layer that is missing
  
  I want to get a sense of the direction that FounderHaus is keen to go towards. 
  
  My sense so far is FounderHaus is evolving to become a Mint of sorts
  
  Happy to support 😊🙏
- Contributor(s): Nima Kaz, Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 16.67
- Attached Filename: None
- Destination Contribution File Location: No file attached
